currentProviderGaps.create_with_distributions: writes the external API but does not persist project or distribution identifiers in the local ledger
currentProviderGaps.sync_mcn_inquiry_status: records sync metadata only; it does not query provider state or upsert mcn_inquiries
currentProviderGaps.maximumRecoverablePhase: mcn_planning until provider inquiry sync is implemented

policies.outwardSendConfirmation: ten-minute one-time request fingerprint confirmed through AskUserQuestion
policies.fieldSelectionBinding: selected columns remain preparation evidence until a real distribution is committed
policies.stateRefresh: on resume, compaction, unknown write, conflict, missing state, and before outward send
policies.unknownWriteRecovery: current provider: get_workflow_state by demand identity from existing business facts; ledger trace_id reconciliation is target-only and an unknown external create remains blocked; never blind retry
policies.postSearchContinuation: a successful search_creators result immediately continues to rank_mcns without AskUserQuestion; failures use AskUserQuestion for clarification or a safe recovery choice
policies.manualSourcingPlacement: optional pre-send enrichment only; never proves distribution or recovery
policies.rankCreatorsPrerequisite: committed WeCom distribution plus completed recovery
